videos.headline: Missouri captures TransPerfect Music City Bowl victory with win over Iowa
videos.description: Missouri erases a 10-point second-half deficit to beat Iowa and win the TransPerfect Music City Bowl.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Missouri captures TransPerfect Music City Bowl victory with win over Iowa) 2024/12/30 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Terrell Washington Jr. scampers into end zone for Iowa TD
videos.description: Iowa gets on the board first as Terrell Washington Jr. grabs the touch pass and turns the corner for a 6-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Terrell Washington Jr. scampers into end zone for Iowa TD) 2024/12/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Theo Wease Jr. hauls in Missouri TD in back of the end zone
videos.description: Missouri's Brady Cook slings it to Theo Wease Jr. for an 8-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Theo Wease Jr. hauls in Missouri TD in back of the end zone) 2024/12/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Iowa's Kaden Wetjen speeds away for 100-yard kickoff return TD
videos.description: Iowa retakes a lead as Kaden Wetjen takes off down the sideline for an 100-yard kickoff return touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Iowa's Kaden Wetjen speeds away for 100-yard kickoff return TD) 2024/12/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Brady Cook finds Marquis Johnson wide open for a TD
videos.description: Missouri evens up the score as Brady Cook floats one to Marquis Johnson in the end zone for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Brady Cook finds Marquis Johnson wide open for a TD) 2024/12/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Iowa QB Brendan Sullivan nearly scores miraculous TD
videos.description: Iowa quarterback Brendan Sullivan avoids multiple defenders and is tackled at the 1-yard line on a miraculous rush.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Iowa QB Brendan Sullivan nearly scores miraculous TD) 2024/12/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kamari Moulton puts Iowa ahead with touchdown
videos.description: Iowa takes the lead as Kamari Moulton scores the short touchdown before halftime.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kamari Moulton puts Iowa ahead with touchdown) 2024/12/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Joshua Manning turns the corner for a Missouri TD
videos.description: Missouri cuts into Iowa's lead as Joshua Manning finds the end zone from four yards out.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Joshua Manning turns the corner for a Missouri TD) 2024/12/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Missouri's Toriano Pride Jr. steps in front of the pass for an INT
videos.description: Missouri gets the turnover as Toriano Pride Jr. steps in front of the pass for the pick.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Missouri's Toriano Pride Jr. steps in front of the pass for an INT) 2024/12/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Missouri takes the lead on a Blake Craig 56-yard field goal
videos.description: Missouri takes the lead with under five minutes remaining on kicker Blake Craig's 56-yard field goal.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Missouri takes the lead on a Blake Craig 56-yard field goal) 2024/12/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Missouri stuffs Iowa's QB sneak on 4th down to clinch bowl win
videos.description: Missouri stands strong at the line of scrimmage to stuff the quarterback sneak and seal a win in the TransPerfect Music City Bowl.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Missouri stuffs Iowa's QB sneak on 4th down to clinch bowl win) 2024/12/30 ESHEET
